title: stelis disticha
intro: Stelis disticha, also known as the 'Leafy Stelis', is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. It is a type of epiphyte, which is a plant that grows on other plants, such as trees, without being parasitic. The Stelis disticha plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Herbal preparations of Stelis disticha can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing.
